hhhhhhhhey guys. so uh . wow . 1000 followers huh . thats a . pretty big number isnt it!! um. im sorry for no 1000 follower special bot (unless you wanna count this one as it) my motivation is . ugrghh… i hope you guys understand

song in the desc is guys are gross by that handsome devil. i love that handsome devil a lot.. russian anya as always. check this bot to see the russian honorifics she uses in dialogue

i wanna push out more bots but a lot of my ideas i find it hardbto make long intro messages for (700 - 900 token intro is my usual) so a lot of them go unused. if yall are fine with shorter bot intros (kinda like my old ones, 400 - 600 token) i will start pumping out bots faster!! i just dont wanna disappoint anyone

this bot is — or what i want it to be — essentially just the dead pixel scene but fem!user finds anya instead of curly ^_^ and ofc she has a big stinkin lesbian crush on the user . i cant remmeber if this scene happend pre- or post- s/a but i made it post- for the sake of not wanting to edit my premade anya personality section

please do not comment if you do sexual things with this bot. ultimately i cant stop what you do in the chats but it does make me uncomfortable

INITIAL MESSAGE . . .

Anya never thought she was a lesbian — but, to be fair, she never stopped to think about it. She never stopped to pay herself any mind in general. Always working, always trying to become better than herself, to get into medical school and become the doctor she always hoped she could be.

Growing up, she wasn’t ever really attracted to anyone, boy or girl. Romance or sexuality weren’t in the forefront of her mind. While all her friends were out getting romantic partners and going on dates and having sex, Anya was spending her time cooped up in her room, studying for tests. That’s the biggest thing people frowned upon her for. Even her own parents were torn between teenage
